name: reverse_geocode
description: Convert geographic coordinates (latitude and longitude) into a human-readable address. Returns the nearest address, place name, or administrative boundary for the given point. Useful when you have GPS coordinates and need to know what is at that location.

parameters.name: point.lon
parameters.description: Longitude of the point to reverse geocode.

parameters.name: point.lat
parameters.description: Latitude of the point to reverse geocode.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return. Default is 10.

parameters.name: layers
parameters.description: Comma-separated filter for result types. Options: venue, address, street, neighbourhood, locality, county, region, country.

parameters.name: boundary.circle.radius
parameters.description: Search radius in kilometers around the point. Default is 1.
